inline_comments.message:
Liam, I don't get it why we need this conversion. Where this Map<ToscaEntityKey, ToscaPolicy> is being used? 

Same for policy type and data type

Because the API may not be only user of these classes and/or the API could be expanded in the future. The current way the policies as a list of singleton maps is only that way because that's the only way we can automatically parse the TOSCA JSON directly. I thought it good to add a method that translates the policies into a map that can actually be managed programatically rather easily if someone decides to use this API as a Java API or if we wanted to add something to the API later.

Please see the similar methods on ToscaServiceTemplate.
maybe just remove this line altogether?
